steps.t: Signs of the missing hunter can likely be found north-east of the hunters' camp in Thinglad. You should search the woods around the camp for signs of …
Another sign of the missing hunter looks to be not far from the first in Thinglad, just south of that spot. You should search the woods around the cam…
Signs of the missing hunter can be found near the hunters' camp in Thinglad. You should search the woods around the camp for signs of the missing hunt…
The missing hunter is surely nearby, south and east of the hunter's camp in Thinglad. You should search for the missing hunter.
